    # We need to check the result, but history entries don't have results directly

for i, trans in enumerate(transitions):
    result = trans.result
    if result.get('gameplay_changed', False):
        print(f"  Transition {i}: {trans.action} -> gameplay_changed=True, state_node={result.get('state_node_id', 'N/A')}")
</parameter>
